title: hieracium buhsei
intro: Hieracium buhsei, also known as Hawkweed or Devil's Paintbrush, is a flowering plant species within the dandelion-like family of plants. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of sesquiterpene lactones. The health benefits of Hieracium buhsei include its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve wound healing. Hieracium buhsei is typically prepared as an herbal tea or tincture, which can be used to make topical applications or taken internally to reap its medicinal benefits.
